name: comps_search
title: Comparable-sales search
description: Find genuinely comparable lots for a piece of equipment using semantic (pgvector) proximity over normalized make/model/spec/description embeddings, with metadata filters. Returns candidate lot_ids + similarity ONLY; authoritative numbers are supplied separately by structured_query (vector finds the lots, SQL supplies the trusted numbers).

query.description: Natural-language equipment description, e.g. '2023 John Deere X9 1100 combine'.

min_similarity.description: Confidence floor; below this the tool returns no comps rather than weak matches.

classification_receipt.description: How the query was classified (see analyze/classification receipt).

low_confidence.description: True when no comp cleared min_similarity — caller must say 'no good comps' rather than fabricate.
